jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at ICAT
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
